contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases one reference on the sk_buff by calling kfree_skb, which decrements the skb's refcount and frees the buffer if the refcount reaches zero. After this call, the caller must not access the skb. This function represents the release side of the skb lifecycle; it always executes and has no return value to check.
